response.justification: The candidate is an experienced, versatile senior engineer with ~15 years across web, mobile, and systems work, but the role demands deep, current C++ expertise for industrial automation. Their only professional C++ experience was a ~7-month stint at National Instruments in 2014–2015; recent work centers on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. There is no evidence of IEC 62443/SDL practice, MQTT or industrial protocols, or industrial-cybersecurity exposure, which are core to this position.
strengths: Long, broad engineering career with strong software craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD, pairing)
Real low-latency, high-throughput systems experience (async I/O, fibers, event-driven microservices at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrated mentorship and knowledge-sharing (workshops, dojos, courses)
concerns: Minimal and dated professional C++ experience; core stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang
No industrial automation, IoT protocol (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA), or IEC 62443/SDL security background
No Azure or message-broker-at-scale experience explicitly matching the role's platform requirements
